category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a digital camera library; official GitHub README describes libgphoto2 as a library for accessing digital cameras: https://github.com/gphoto/libgphoto2
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libgphoto2; official GitHub repository title is gphoto/libgphoto2: https://github.com/gphoto/libgphoto2
docs_sources: Official gPhoto documentation page links libgphoto2 API documentation and manual: https://gphoto.sourceforge.io/doc/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub README lists the gphoto GitHub repository at https://github.com/gphoto/libgphoto2
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a digital camera library; official GitHub README mentions PTP, MTP, USB communication, and that libgphoto2 is a backend library: https://github.com/gphoto/libgphoto2
